content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "遲到的原因",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "不好意思，我遲到了。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ chídào le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, wo3 chi2 dao4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Sorry, I'm late.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 늦었습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒關係。為什麼遲到？",
          "pinyin": "Méi guānxi. Wèishénme chídào?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "mei2 guan1 xi5. wei4 shen2 me5 chi2 dao4?",
          "translation_en": "No problem. Why are you late?",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요. 왜 늦었어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "因為路上塞車了，所以比較慢。",
          "pinyin": "Yīnwèi lùshàng sāichē le, suǒyǐ bǐjiào màn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "yin1 wei4 lu4 shang4 sai1 che1 le5, suo3 yi3 bi3 jiao4 man4.",
          "translation_en": "Because there was a traffic jam on the road, so it was slower.",
          "translation_ko": "길이 막혀서 좀 늦었어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "原來是這樣。下次可以早一點出門。",
          "pinyin": "Yuánlái shì zhèyàng. Xià cì kěyǐ zǎo yīdiǎn chūmén.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "yuan2 lai2 shi4 zhe4 yang4. xia4 ci4 ke3 yi3 zao3 yi1 dian3 chu1 men2.",
          "translation_en": "I see. Next time you can leave a bit earlier.",
          "translation_ko": "그렇군요. 다음에는 조금 일찍 나가세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好，我知道了。謝謝你等我。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ zhīdào le. Xièxiè nǐ děng wǒ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3, wo3 zhi1 dao4 le5. xie4 xie4 ni3 deng3 wo3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I understand. Thank you for waiting for me.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 알겠습니다. 기다려 주셔서 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why was the person late?",
          "question_ko": "그 사람은 왜 늦었습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Because of a traffic jam", "Because he forgot the time", "Because he was sick"],
          "options_ko": ["교통 체증 때문에", "시간을 잊어서", "아파서"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of apology and explanation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell a partner why you were late today. Use 因為 and 所以."
    },
    {
      "title": "為什麼不想吃",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我們一起去吃午餐，好不好？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒmen yīqǐ qù chī wǔcān, hǎo bù hǎo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 men5 yi1 qi3 qu4 chi1 wu3 can1, hao3 bu4 hao3?",
          "translation_en": "Let's go have lunch together, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "같이 점심 먹으러 갈래요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "謝謝，可是我不想吃。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxiè, kěshì wǒ bù xiǎng chī.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "xie4 xie4, ke3 shi4 wo3 bu4 xiang3 chi1.",
          "translation_en": "Thanks, but I don't want to eat.",
          "translation_ko": "고맙지만, 먹고 싶지 않아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "為什麼？你肚子不餓嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wèishénme? Nǐ dùzi bù è ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wei4 shen2 me5? ni3 du4 zi5 bu4 e4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Why? Aren't you hungry?",
          "translation_ko": "왜요? 배 안 고파요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "因為我早上吃太多了，現在不餓。",
          "pinyin": "Yīnwèi wǒ zǎoshang chī tài duō le, xiànzài bù è.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "yin1 wei4 wo3 zao3 shang4 chi1 tai4 duo1 le5, xian4 zai4 bu4 e4.",
          "translation_en": "Because I ate too much this morning, I'm not hungry now.",
          "translation_ko": "아침에 너무 많이 먹어서 지금은 안 배고파요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "原來是這樣。那我們晚上再一起吃吧。",
          "pinyin": "Yuánlái shì zhèyàng. Nà wǒmen wǎnshàng zài yīqǐ chī ba.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "yuan2 lai2 shi4 zhe4 yang4. na4 wo3 men5 wan3 shang4 zai4 yi1 qi3 chi1 ba5.",
          "translation_en": "I see. Then let's eat together in the evening.",
          "translation_ko": "그렇군요. 그럼 저녁에 같이 먹어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊，晚上見。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, wǎnshàng jiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 a5, wan3 shang4 jian4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, see you in the evening.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 저녁에 봐요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why doesn't B want to eat lunch?",
          "question_ko": "B는 왜 점심을 먹고 싶지 않습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Because he is sick", "Because he ate too much breakfast", "Because he wants to save money"],
          "options_ko": ["아파서", "아침을 너무 많이 먹어서", "돈을 아끼고 싶어서"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the polite refusal and explanation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell a friend why you don't want to eat something today. Use 因為 and 所以."
    },
    {
      "title": "為什麼想買",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你想買這個手機嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xiǎng mǎi zhège shǒujī ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ni3 xiang3 mai3 zhe4 ge5 shou3 ji1 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Do you want to buy this phone?",
          "translation_ko": "이 핸드폰 사고 싶어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對，我想買。因為我的手機太舊了。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ xiǎng mǎi. Yīnwèi wǒ de shǒujī tài jiù le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, wo3 xiang3 mai3. yin1 wei4 wo3 de5 shou3 ji1 tai4 jiu4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I want to buy it. Because my phone is too old.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 사고 싶어요. 제 핸드폰이 너무 오래됐거든요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "這個新的比較貴，你有錢嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Zhège xīn de bǐjiào guì, nǐ yǒu qián ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "zhe4 ge5 xin1 de5 bi3 jiao4 gui4, ni3 you3 qian2 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "This new one is more expensive. Do you have money?",
          "translation_ko": "이 새 건 더 비싼데, 돈 있어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有，我最近有在省錢，所以可以買。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, wǒ zuìjìn yǒu zài shěngqián, suǒyǐ kěyǐ mǎi.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "you3, wo3 zui4 jin4 you3 zai4 sheng3 qian2, suo3 yi3 ke3 yi3 mai3.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I've been saving money recently, so I can buy it.",
          "translation_ko": "있어요, 요즘 돈을 아끼고 있어서 살 수 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那很好。你打算在哪裡買？",
          "pinyin": "Nà hěn hǎo. Nǐ dǎsuàn zài nǎlǐ mǎi?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "na4 hen3 hao3. ni3 da3 suan4 zai4 na3 li3 mai3?",
          "translation_en": "That's good. Where do you plan to buy it?",
          "translation_ko": "좋네요. 어디서 살 계획이에요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "在商店買，因為比較便宜。",
          "pinyin": "Zài shāngdiàn mǎi, yīnwèi bǐjiào piányí.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "zai4 shang1 dian4 mai3, yin1 wei4 bi3 jiao4 pian2 yi2.",
          "translation_en": "At the store, because it's cheaper.",
          "translation_ko": "가게에서 살 거예요, 더 싸거든요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why does B want to buy a new phone?",
          "question_ko": "B는 왜 새 핸드폰을 사고 싶어합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Because the old one is broken", "Because the old one is too old", "Because it's on sale"],
          "options_ko": ["예전 것이 고장 나서", "예전 것이 너무 오래돼서", "할인 중이라서"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on expressing reasons for wanting to buy something.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell a friend why you want to buy something. Use 因為 and 所以."
    }
  ]
}
